description_long: This object is a portable radio receiver with a rectangular body finished in a vibrant blue color. The front face features a large speaker grille, a digital display, and several control buttons, all set within a contrasting black and red panel. A black carrying handle arches over the top, making it easy to transport. On one side, a round tuning knob is visible, while the other side is relatively plain. The radio sits atop a rustic wooden stool, but the focus is on the radio itself, which has a visible telescopic antenna extending from the top. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for use in various urban environments.
description: A compact blue portable radio receiver with a black handle, front speaker grille, digital display, and side tuning knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, digital display, control buttons, and the handle on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the round tuning knob and the slim profile of the radio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and the handle, with no controls or display visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain side with the handle and antenna visible.
